channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Tilak-jail-books
item.description: Tilak’s Study in Jail Source: Reminisces and Anecdotes of Lokamanya Tilak, Edited by S V Bapat, 1928 ================= When Lokamanya Tilak returned to his mother-country after his six years incarceration at Mandalay he carried with him nearly four hundred books, mostly on Gita and Hindu religious philosophy. These books were packed in two crates and a list of them was made by Lokamanya Tilak himself and signed by the jailor with the remark “Packed in my presence”.
